title: oxalis regnellii var. catharinensis
intro: Oxalis regnellii var. catharinensis, also known as the Purple Sorrel or Catharinense Sorrel, is a type of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, due to its high concentration of oxalic acid and other flavonoids. The health benefits of Oxalis regnellii var. catharinensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
